#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""macOS LaunchAgent/Daemon Persistence Enumerator — Persistence Analyzer"""
import os, plistlib, subprocess, time
from collections import defaultdict
from pathlib import Path

# LaunchAgent/Daemon search paths with persistence risk levels
LAUNCHD_PATHS = {
    'user_agents': {
        'path': os.path.expanduser('~/Library/LaunchAgents'),
        'scope': 'User',
        'risk': 'HIGH',
        'desc': 'User-level auto-start (writable by user)',
    },
    'system_agents': {
        'path': '/Library/LaunchAgents',
        'scope': 'System',
        'risk': 'MEDIUM',
        'desc': 'System-wide agents (requires admin)',
    },
    'system_daemons': {
        'path': '/Library/LaunchDaemons',
        'scope': 'System',
        'risk': 'HIGH',
        'desc': 'System daemons (run as root)',
    },
    'apple_agents': {
        'path': '/System/Library/LaunchAgents',
        'scope': 'Apple',
        'risk': 'LOW',
        'desc': 'Apple system agents (SIP-protected)',
    },
    'apple_daemons': {
        'path': '/System/Library/LaunchDaemons',
        'scope': 'Apple',
        'risk': 'LOW',
        'desc': 'Apple system daemons (SIP-protected)',
    },
}

# Suspicious persistence indicators
SUSPICIOUS_INDICATORS = {
    'hidden_binary': {'desc': 'Program path contains hidden directory (dot-prefix)', 'risk': 'CRITICAL'},
    'tmp_binary': {'desc': 'Program runs from /tmp or /var/tmp', 'risk': 'CRITICAL'},
    'writable_binary': {'desc': 'Program binary is world-writable', 'risk': 'HIGH'},
    'missing_binary': {'desc': 'Referenced program does not exist', 'risk': 'HIGH'},
    'shell_command': {'desc': 'Runs shell directly (bash/sh/zsh)', 'risk': 'MEDIUM'},
    'curl_wget': {'desc': 'Downloads content at startup', 'risk': 'CRITICAL'},
    'encoded_args': {'desc': 'Base64 or encoded arguments detected', 'risk': 'HIGH'},
    'run_at_load': {'desc': 'Runs immediately at load (no trigger)', 'risk': 'MEDIUM'},
    'keep_alive': {'desc': 'Auto-restarts if killed', 'risk': 'MEDIUM'},
    'watch_paths': {'desc': 'Monitors file system paths for changes', 'risk': 'LOW'},
    'non_apple_root_daemon': {'desc': 'Non-Apple daemon running as root', 'risk': 'HIGH'},
    'network_listen': {'desc': 'Opens network sockets', 'risk': 'MEDIUM'},
    'cron_schedule': {'desc': 'Runs on schedule (StartCalendarInterval)', 'risk': 'LOW'},
}

# Known legitimate third-party services
KNOWN_LEGITIMATE = {
    'com.google.keystone', 'com.microsoft.update', 'com.microsoft.autoupdate',
    'com.docker.', 'com.adobe.', 'org.chromium.',
    'com.objective-see.', 'com.malwarebytes.',
}


class LaunchdEnumerator:
    """Enumerate and analyze macOS LaunchAgent/Daemon persistence"""

    def __init__(self):
        self.items = []
        self.findings = []

    def enumerate_all(self):
        """Scan all launchd directories"""
        result = {
            'directories': {},
            'all_items': [],
            'by_scope': defaultdict(list),
            'by_risk': defaultdict(list),
            'suspicious': [],
            'stats': {},
        }

        for dir_key, dir_info in LAUNCHD_PATHS.items():
            dir_path = dir_info['path']
            dir_result = self._scan_directory(dir_path, dir_info)
            result['directories'][dir_key] = dir_result

            for item in dir_result.get('items', []):
                result['all_items'].append(item)
                result['by_scope'][dir_info['scope']].append(item)
                if item.get('suspicious_flags'):
                    result['suspicious'].append(item)
                    result['by_risk']['SUSPICIOUS'].append(item)

        # Also check launchctl for loaded services
        loaded = self._get_loaded_services()
        result['loaded_services'] = loaded

        # Statistics
        total = len(result['all_items'])
        result['stats'] = {
            'total_plists': total,
            'user_agents': len(result['by_scope'].get('User', [])),
            'system_agents': sum(1 for ii in result['all_items'] if ii['scope'] == 'System' and ii['dir_key'].endswith('agents')),
            'system_daemons': sum(1 for ii in result['all_items'] if ii['scope'] == 'System' and ii['dir_key'].endswith('daemons')),
            'apple_items': len(result['by_scope'].get('Apple', [])),
            'suspicious_count': len(result['suspicious']),
            'loaded_count': len(loaded),
            'third_party': sum(1 for ii in result['all_items'] if not ii.get('is_apple', False)),
            'disabled': sum(1 for ii in result['all_items'] if ii.get('disabled', False)),
        }

        result['findings'] = self.findings[:]
        return result

    def _scan_directory(self, dir_path, dir_info):
        """Scan a single launchd directory for plist files"""
        dir_result = {
            'path': dir_path,
            'exists': os.path.isdir(dir_path),
            'items': [],
            'error': None,
        }

        if not dir_result['exists']:
            return dir_result

        try:
            plist_files = [ff for ff in os.listdir(dir_path) if ff.endswith('.plist')]
        except PermissionError:
            dir_result['error'] = 'Permission denied'
            return dir_result

        for plist_name in sorted(plist_files):
            plist_path = os.path.join(dir_path, plist_name)
            item = self._parse_plist(plist_path, plist_name, dir_info)
            dir_result['items'].append(item)

        return dir_result

    def _parse_plist(self, plist_path, plist_name, dir_info):
        """Parse a single launchd plist file"""
        item = {
            'file': plist_name,
            'path': plist_path,
            'scope': dir_info['scope'],
            'dir_key': dir_info.get('path', '').split('/')[-1].lower() if dir_info.get('path') else '',
            'dir_risk': dir_info['risk'],
            'label': '',
            'program': '',
            'program_args': [],
            'run_at_load': False,
            'keep_alive': False,
            'disabled': False,
            'user_name': '',
            'group_name': '',
            'watch_paths': [],
            'start_interval': 0,
            'start_calendar': None,
            'environment': {},
            'sockets': {},
            'is_apple': plist_name.startswith('com.apple.'),
            'suspicious_flags': [],
            'parse_error': None,
        }

        try:
            with open(plist_path, 'rb') as pf:
                plist_data = plistlib.load(pf)
        except Exception as exc:
            item['parse_error'] = str(exc)
            return item

        # Extract key fields
        item['label'] = plist_data.get('Label', '')
        item['program'] = plist_data.get('Program', '')

        prog_args = plist_data.get('ProgramArguments', [])
        if isinstance(prog_args, list):
            item['program_args'] = [str(aa) for aa in prog_args]
            if not item['program'] and prog_args:
                item['program'] = str(prog_args[0])

        item['run_at_load'] = bool(plist_data.get('RunAtLoad', False))
        item['keep_alive'] = bool(plist_data.get('KeepAlive', False))
        item['disabled'] = bool(plist_data.get('Disabled', False))
        item['user_name'] = plist_data.get('UserName', '')
        item['group_name'] = plist_data.get('GroupName', '')

        watch = plist_data.get('WatchPaths', [])
        if isinstance(watch, list):
            item['watch_paths'] = [str(ww) for ww in watch]

        item['start_interval'] = plist_data.get('StartInterval', 0)
        item['start_calendar'] = plist_data.get('StartCalendarInterval')

        env_vars = plist_data.get('EnvironmentVariables', {})
        if isinstance(env_vars, dict):
            item['environment'] = {str(kk): str(vv) for kk, vv in env_vars.items()}

        socks = plist_data.get('Sockets', {})
        if isinstance(socks, dict):
            item['sockets'] = socks

        # Additional fields
        item['stdout'] = plist_data.get('StandardOutPath', '')
        item['stderr'] = plist_data.get('StandardErrorPath', '')
        item['working_dir'] = plist_data.get('WorkingDirectory', '')
        item['nice'] = plist_data.get('Nice', 0)
        item['limit_load'] = plist_data.get('LimitLoadToSessionType', '')

        # Security analysis
        self._analyze_item(item, dir_info)

        return item

    def _analyze_item(self, item, dir_info):
        """Analyze a launchd item for suspicious indicators"""
        program = item['program']
        prog_args = item['program_args']
        all_args = ' '.join(prog_args)

        # Hidden binary path
        if program:
            parts = program.split('/')
            for part in parts:
                if part.startswith('.') and part not in ('.', '..'):
                    item['suspicious_flags'].append('hidden_binary')
                    self.findings.append(('CRITICAL', 'Hidden path in %s: %s' % (item['file'], program)))
                    break

        # Temp directory binary
        if program and (program.startswith('/tmp/') or program.startswith('/var/tmp/')):
            item['suspicious_flags'].append('tmp_binary')
            self.findings.append(('CRITICAL', 'Temp directory binary in %s: %s' % (item['file'], program)))

        # Missing binary
        if program and not os.path.exists(program):
            item['suspicious_flags'].append('missing_binary')
            self.findings.append(('HIGH', 'Missing binary in %s: %s' % (item['file'], program)))

        # World-writable binary
        if program and os.path.exists(program):
            try:
                mode = os.stat(program).st_mode
                if mode & 0o002:
                    item['suspicious_flags'].append('writable_binary')
                    self.findings.append(('HIGH', 'World-writable binary in %s: %s' % (item['file'], program)))
            except OSError:
                pass

        # Shell command execution
        shells = ['/bin/sh', '/bin/bash', '/bin/zsh', '/usr/bin/env']
        if program in shells or (prog_args and str(prog_args[0]) in shells):
            item['suspicious_flags'].append('shell_command')

        # Download at startup
        for arg in prog_args:
            arg_lower = str(arg).lower()
            if 'curl' in arg_lower or 'wget' in arg_lower:
                item['suspicious_flags'].append('curl_wget')
                self.findings.append(('CRITICAL', 'Download command in %s: %s' % (item['file'], arg)))
                break

        # Encoded arguments
        for arg in prog_args:
            arg_str = str(arg)
            if len(arg_str) > 50 and all(cc in 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/=' for cc in arg_str):
                item['suspicious_flags'].append('encoded_args')
                self.findings.append(('HIGH', 'Possible encoded argument in %s' % item['file']))
                break

        # RunAtLoad
        if item['run_at_load']:
            item['suspicious_flags'].append('run_at_load')

        # KeepAlive
        if item['keep_alive']:
            item['suspicious_flags'].append('keep_alive')

        # Non-Apple root daemon
        if dir_info['scope'] == 'System' and not item['is_apple']:
            if 'daemons' in dir_info.get('path', '').lower():
                item['suspicious_flags'].append('non_apple_root_daemon')
                self.findings.append(('HIGH', 'Non-Apple root daemon: %s (%s)' % (item['label'], program)))

        # Network sockets
        if item['sockets']:
            item['suspicious_flags'].append('network_listen')

        # Watch paths
        if item['watch_paths']:
            item['suspicious_flags'].append('watch_paths')

        # Calendar schedule
        if item['start_calendar']:
            item['suspicious_flags'].append('cron_schedule')

    def _get_loaded_services(self):
        """Get currently loaded launchd services via launchctl"""
        loaded = []
        try:
            proc = subprocess.run(
                ['launchctl', 'list'],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10
            )
            for line in proc.stdout.strip().split('\n')[1:]:
                parts = line.split('\t')
                if len(parts) >= 3:
                    pid = parts[0].strip()
                    status = parts[1].strip()
                    label = parts[2].strip()
                    loaded.append({
                        'label': label,
                        'pid': int(pid) if pid != '-' else None,
                        'status': int(status) if status != '-' else None,
                        'running': pid != '-',
                    })
        except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
            pass
        return loaded


def demo():
    """Enumerate real launchd persistence"""
    print("macOS LaunchAgent/Daemon Persistence Enumerator v1.0")
    print("=" * 60)

    enumerator = LaunchdEnumerator()
    result = enumerator.enumerate_all()

    stats = result['stats']
    print("\n  Total plists found: %d" % stats['total_plists'])
    print("  User agents: %d" % stats['user_agents'])
    print("  System agents: %d" % stats['system_agents'])
    print("  System daemons: %d" % stats['system_daemons'])
    print("  Apple items: %d" % stats['apple_items'])
    print("  Third-party: %d" % stats['third_party'])
    print("  Suspicious: %d" % stats['suspicious_count'])
    print("  Disabled: %d" % stats['disabled'])
    print("  Loaded services: %d" % stats['loaded_count'])

    # Show by directory
    print("\n  Directories:")
    for dir_key, dir_result in result['directories'].items():
        dir_info = LAUNCHD_PATHS[dir_key]
        item_count = len(dir_result.get('items', []))
        exists = dir_result.get('exists', False)
        status = '%d plists' % item_count if exists else 'NOT FOUND'
        print("    [%s] %-50s %s" % (dir_info['risk'], dir_info['path'], status))

    # Show third-party items (non-Apple) — most interesting for persistence hunting
    print("\n  Third-Party Persistence (non-Apple):")
    for item in result['all_items']:
        if item['is_apple']:
            continue
        label = item['label'] or item['file']
        program = item['program']
        if len(program) > 50:
            program = '...' + program[-47:]
        flags = ', '.join(item['suspicious_flags'][:3]) if item['suspicious_flags'] else 'none'
        scope = item['scope']
        status_parts = []
        if item['run_at_load']:
            status_parts.append('RunAtLoad')
        if item['keep_alive']:
            status_parts.append('KeepAlive')
        if item['disabled']:
            status_parts.append('DISABLED')
        status_str = ', '.join(status_parts) if status_parts else 'manual'
        print("    [%s] %-45s %s" % (scope, label[:45], status_str))
        print("         Program: %s" % (program or 'N/A'))
        if flags != 'none':
            print("         Flags: %s" % flags)

    # Suspicious items detail
    if result['suspicious']:
        print("\n  Suspicious Items (%d):" % len(result['suspicious']))
        for item in result['suspicious']:
            label = item['label'] or item['file']
            flags = item['suspicious_flags']
            critical_flags = [ff for ff in flags if SUSPICIOUS_INDICATORS.get(ff, {}).get('risk') in ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')]
            if critical_flags:
                print("    [!] %s" % label)
                for ff in critical_flags:
                    ind = SUSPICIOUS_INDICATORS.get(ff, {})
                    print("        %s: %s" % (ind.get('risk', '?'), ind.get('desc', ff)))

    # Loaded services stats
    loaded = result['loaded_services']
    if loaded:
        running = [ll for ll in loaded if ll['running']]
        print("\n  Loaded Services: %d total, %d running" % (len(loaded), len(running)))
        # Show non-Apple running services
        non_apple_running = [ll for ll in running if not ll['label'].startswith('com.apple.')]
        if non_apple_running:
            print("  Non-Apple Running Services:")
            for svc in non_apple_running[:15]:
                print("    PID %-6s %s" % (svc['pid'], svc['label']))

    # Security findings
    if result['findings']:
        print("\n  Security Findings (%d):" % len(result['findings']))
        for sev, msg in result['findings'][:20]:
            print("    [%s] %s" % (sev, msg))

    print("\nLaunchd persistence enumerator ready")


demo()
xpc_service_enumerator:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""macOS XPC Service Enumerator + Attack Surface Mapper"""
import os, plistlib, subprocess, re
from collections import defaultdict
from pathlib import Path

# XPC service search paths
XPC_SEARCH_PATHS = [
    '/System/Library/XPCServices',
    '/System/Library/Frameworks',
    '/System/Library/PrivateFrameworks',
    '/Library/Apple/System/Library/XPCServices',
]

# Application XPC service paths
APP_PATHS = [
    '/Applications',
    os.path.expanduser('~/Applications'),
]

# Known high-value XPC services (attack surface)
HIGH_VALUE_SERVICES = {
    'com.apple.security': 'Security framework — keychain, code signing, trust',
    'com.apple.authd': 'Authorization — privilege escalation target',
    'com.apple.tccd': 'TCC daemon — privacy permission bypass target',
    'com.apple.securityd': 'Security daemon — certificate/key management',
    'com.apple.coreservices': 'Core Services — LaunchServices, file types',
    'com.apple.installd': 'Installer daemon — package installation',
    'com.apple.MobileFileIntegrity': 'AMFI — code signing enforcement',
    'com.apple.sandboxd': 'Sandbox daemon — sandbox policy',
    'com.apple.opendirectoryd': 'Open Directory — user/group management',
    'com.apple.diskarbitrationd': 'Disk Arbitration — mount/unmount',
}

# XPC connection types and their risk levels
XPC_CONNECTION_TYPES = {
    'ServiceType_Application': ('Application', 'LOW', 'App-scoped XPC service'),
    'ServiceType_System': ('System', 'MEDIUM', 'System-wide Mach service'),
    'ServiceType_User': ('User', 'MEDIUM', 'Per-user Mach service'),
    'ServiceType_Privileged': ('Privileged', 'HIGH', 'Runs with elevated privileges'),
}


class XPCEnumerator:
    """Enumerate and analyze macOS XPC services for attack surface"""

    def __init__(self):
        self.findings = []

    def enumerate_all(self):
        """Full XPC service enumeration"""
        result = {
            'system_xpc': [],
            'framework_xpc': [],
            'app_xpc': [],
            'launchd_xpc': [],
            'mach_services': [],
            'by_bundle': defaultdict(list),
            'stats': {},
        }

        # Enumerate system XPC services
        for search_path in XPC_SEARCH_PATHS:
            if os.path.isdir(search_path):
                xpc_services = self._find_xpc_bundles(search_path, max_depth=3)
                result['system_xpc'].extend(xpc_services)

        # Enumerate framework XPC services
        fw_paths = ['/System/Library/Frameworks', '/System/Library/PrivateFrameworks']
        for fw_path in fw_paths:
            if os.path.isdir(fw_path):
                fw_xpc = self._find_xpc_bundles(fw_path, max_depth=4)
                result['framework_xpc'].extend(fw_xpc)

        # Enumerate app XPC services
        for app_path in APP_PATHS:
            if os.path.isdir(app_path):
                app_xpc = self._find_xpc_bundles(app_path, max_depth=5)
                result['app_xpc'].extend(app_xpc)

        # Get launchd XPC services
        result['launchd_xpc'] = self._get_launchd_xpc()

        # Get Mach services (bootstrap namespace)
        result['mach_services'] = self._get_mach_services()

        # Organize by parent bundle
        for xpc in result['system_xpc'] + result['framework_xpc'] + result['app_xpc']:
            parent = xpc.get('parent_bundle', 'Unknown')
            result['by_bundle'][parent].append(xpc)

        # Statistics
        total_xpc = len(result['system_xpc']) + len(result['framework_xpc']) + len(result['app_xpc'])
        result['stats'] = {
            'system_xpc_count': len(result['system_xpc']),
            'framework_xpc_count': len(result['framework_xpc']),
            'app_xpc_count': len(result['app_xpc']),
            'total_xpc_bundles': total_xpc,
            'launchd_xpc_count': len(result['launchd_xpc']),
            'mach_services': len(result['mach_services']),
            'parent_bundles': len(result['by_bundle']),
            'high_value_targets': 0,
        }

        # Count high-value targets
        for xpc in result['system_xpc'] + result['framework_xpc']:
            bid = xpc.get('bundle_id', '')
            for hv_prefix in HIGH_VALUE_SERVICES:
                if bid.startswith(hv_prefix):
                    result['stats']['high_value_targets'] += 1
                    break

        result['findings'] = self.findings[:]
        return result

    def _find_xpc_bundles(self, search_path, max_depth=4):
        """Find .xpc bundles in a directory tree"""
        xpc_list = []

        for dirpath, dirnames, filenames in os.walk(search_path):
            # Depth control
            depth = dirpath.replace(search_path, '').count(os.sep)
            if depth >= max_depth:
                dirnames.clear()
                continue

            for dirname in list(dirnames):
                if dirname.endswith('.xpc'):
                    xpc_path = os.path.join(dirpath, dirname)
                    xpc_info = self._parse_xpc_bundle(xpc_path, search_path)
                    if xpc_info:
                        xpc_list.append(xpc_info)

        return xpc_list

    def _parse_xpc_bundle(self, xpc_path, search_root):
        """Parse an XPC service bundle"""
        info = {
            'path': xpc_path,
            'name': os.path.basename(xpc_path),
            'bundle_id': '',
            'executable': '',
            'service_type': '',
            'mach_service_name': '',
            'parent_bundle': '',
            'entitlements': [],
            'sandbox_profile': '',
            'has_info_plist': False,
            'attack_surface': [],
        }

        # Determine parent bundle
        parts = xpc_path.split('/')
        for idx, part in enumerate(parts):
            if part.endswith('.app') or part.endswith('.framework'):
                info['parent_bundle'] = part
                break

        # Parse Info.plist
        info_plist = os.path.join(xpc_path, 'Contents', 'Info.plist')
        if not os.path.exists(info_plist):
            # Try flat bundle layout
            info_plist = os.path.join(xpc_path, 'Info.plist')

        if os.path.exists(info_plist):
            info['has_info_plist'] = True
            try:
                with open(info_plist, 'rb') as pf:
                    plist = plistlib.load(pf)

                info['bundle_id'] = plist.get('CFBundleIdentifier', '')
                info['executable'] = plist.get('CFBundleExecutable', '')
                info['service_type'] = plist.get('XPCService', {}).get('ServiceType', 'Application') if isinstance(plist.get('XPCService'), dict) else ''

                # Mach service name
                mach_services = plist.get('MachServices', {})
                if isinstance(mach_services, dict):
                    info['mach_service_name'] = ', '.join(mach_services.keys())

                # Environment constraints
                env = plist.get('XPCService', {})
                if isinstance(env, dict):
                    info['run_loop_type'] = env.get('RunLoopType', '')
                    info['join_existing'] = env.get('JoinExistingSession', False)
                    if env.get('_SandboxProfile'):
                        info['sandbox_profile'] = env['_SandboxProfile']

            except Exception:
                pass

        # Check executable
        exec_path = os.path.join(xpc_path, 'Contents', 'MacOS', info['executable'])
        if not os.path.exists(exec_path):
            exec_path = os.path.join(xpc_path, info['executable'])

        if os.path.exists(exec_path):
            info['exec_exists'] = True
            info['exec_path'] = exec_path

            # Check code signature
            try:
                proc = subprocess.run(
                    ['codesign', '-dvv', exec_path],
                    capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5
                )
                cs_out = proc.stderr
                info['codesigned'] = proc.returncode == 0
                info['hardened'] = 'runtime' in cs_out.lower()

                if not info['codesigned']:
                    info['attack_surface'].append('UNSIGNED executable')
                    self.findings.append(('CRITICAL', 'Unsigned XPC service: %s' % info['name']))
                elif not info['hardened']:
                    info['attack_surface'].append('No hardened runtime')
            except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
                pass

            # Check entitlements
            try:
                proc = subprocess.run(
                    ['codesign', '-d', '--entitlements', '-', '--xml', exec_path],
                    capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5
                )
                if proc.returncode == 0 and proc.stdout:
                    ent_data = proc.stdout.encode('utf-8', errors='replace')
                    try:
                        ent_plist = plistlib.loads(ent_data)
                        info['entitlements'] = list(ent_plist.keys()) if isinstance(ent_plist, dict) else []

                        # Check for dangerous entitlements
                        dangerous_ents = [
                            'com.apple.private.tcc.allow',
                            'com.apple.rootless.install',
                            'com.apple.security.cs.disable-library-validation',
                            'com.apple.security.cs.allow-unsigned-executable-memory',
                            'com.apple.security.cs.allow-dyld-environment-variables',
                            'com.apple.private.security.no-sandbox',
                        ]
                        for ent in info['entitlements']:
                            if ent in dangerous_ents:
                                info['attack_surface'].append('Dangerous entitlement: %s' % ent)
                                self.findings.append(('HIGH', '%s has %s' % (info['name'], ent)))
                    except Exception:
                        pass
            except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
                pass
        else:
            info['exec_exists'] = False

        # Assess attack surface
        bid = info['bundle_id']
        for hv_prefix, hv_desc in HIGH_VALUE_SERVICES.items():
            if bid.startswith(hv_prefix):
                info['attack_surface'].append('High-value target: %s' % hv_desc)
                break

        return info

    def _get_launchd_xpc(self):
        """Get XPC-related services from launchctl"""
        xpc_services = []
        try:
            proc = subprocess.run(
                ['launchctl', 'list'],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10
            )
            for line in proc.stdout.strip().split('\n')[1:]:
                parts = line.split('\t')
                if len(parts) >= 3:
                    label = parts[2].strip()
                    if 'xpc' in label.lower():
                        pid = parts[0].strip()
                        status = parts[1].strip()
                        xpc_services.append({
                            'label': label,
                            'pid': int(pid) if pid != '-' else None,
                            'status': int(status) if status != '-' else None,
                            'running': pid != '-',
                        })
        except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
            pass
        return xpc_services

    def _get_mach_services(self):
        """Get registered Mach services from bootstrap"""
        services = []
        try:
            proc = subprocess.run(
                ['launchctl', 'list'],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10
            )
            for line in proc.stdout.strip().split('\n')[1:]:
                parts = line.split('\t')
                if len(parts) >= 3:
                    label = parts[2].strip()
                    pid = parts[0].strip()
                    services.append({
                        'name': label,
                        'pid': int(pid) if pid != '-' else None,
                        'running': pid != '-',
                    })
        except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
            pass
        return services


def demo():
    """Run XPC service enumeration on real system"""
    print("macOS XPC Service Enumerator v1.0")
    print("=" * 60)

    enumerator = XPCEnumerator()
    result = enumerator.enumerate_all()

    stats = result['stats']
    print("\n  XPC Service Statistics:")
    print("    System XPC bundles: %d" % stats['system_xpc_count'])
    print("    Framework XPC bundles: %d" % stats['framework_xpc_count'])
    print("    Application XPC bundles: %d" % stats['app_xpc_count'])
    print("    Total XPC bundles: %d" % stats['total_xpc_bundles'])
    print("    Launchd XPC services: %d" % stats['launchd_xpc_count'])
    print("    Mach services: %d" % stats['mach_services'])
    print("    Parent bundles: %d" % stats['parent_bundles'])
    print("    High-value targets: %d" % stats['high_value_targets'])

    # Show framework XPC services (most interesting for attack surface)
    if result['framework_xpc']:
        print("\n  Framework XPC Services (%d):" % len(result['framework_xpc']))
        for xpc in result['framework_xpc'][:20]:
            bid = xpc.get('bundle_id', xpc['name'])
            svc_type = xpc.get('service_type', '?')
            signed = 'Signed' if xpc.get('codesigned') else 'UNSIGNED'
            hardened = '+Hard' if xpc.get('hardened') else ''
            ent_count = len(xpc.get('entitlements', []))
            attacks = len(xpc.get('attack_surface', []))

            if len(bid) > 50:
                bid = bid[:47] + '...'
            print("    %-50s %s%s | %d ents | %d vectors" % (bid, signed, hardened, ent_count, attacks))

            if xpc.get('attack_surface'):
                for atk in xpc['attack_surface'][:2]:
                    print("      -> %s" % atk[:80])

    # Show app XPC services
    if result['app_xpc']:
        print("\n  Application XPC Services (%d):" % len(result['app_xpc']))
        for xpc in result['app_xpc']:
            bid = xpc.get('bundle_id', xpc['name'])
            parent = xpc.get('parent_bundle', '?')
            signed = 'Signed' if xpc.get('codesigned') else 'UNSIGNED'
            if len(bid) > 40:
                bid = bid[:37] + '...'
            print("    [%s] %-40s (%s)" % (signed, bid, parent))

    # Show launchd XPC services
    if result['launchd_xpc']:
        print("\n  Launchd XPC Services (%d):" % len(result['launchd_xpc']))
        for svc in result['launchd_xpc']:
            running = 'PID %s' % svc['pid'] if svc['running'] else 'inactive'
            print("    %-55s %s" % (svc['label'], running))

    # Show by parent bundle (top bundles with most XPC services)
    if result['by_bundle']:
        print("\n  Top Bundles (by XPC service count):")
        top_bundles = sorted(result['by_bundle'].items(), key=lambda xx: len(xx[1]), reverse=True)[:10]
        for bundle_name, bundle_xpc in top_bundles:
            print("    %-45s %d XPC services" % (bundle_name[:45], len(bundle_xpc)))

    # Security findings
    if result['findings']:
        print("\n  Security Findings (%d):" % len(result['findings']))
        for sev, msg in result['findings'][:20]:
            print("    [%s] %s" % (sev, msg))

    print("\nXPC enumerator ready")


demo()
gatekeeper_notarization_analyzer:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""macOS Gatekeeper + Notarization Bypass Analyzer"""
import os, subprocess, re, plistlib
from collections import defaultdict
from pathlib import Path

# Known Gatekeeper bypass techniques
GK_BYPASS_TECHNIQUES = {
    'quarantine_removal': {
        'name': 'Quarantine Attribute Removal',
        'desc': 'Remove com.apple.quarantine xattr to bypass Gatekeeper check',
        'cmd': 'xattr -d com.apple.quarantine <file>',
        'cves': [],
        'risk': 'HIGH',
        'mitigated': 'Requires existing code execution',
    },
    'archive_bypass': {
        'name': 'Archive Format Bypass',
        'desc': 'Certain archive types (DMG, ISO, sparse images) may not propagate quarantine',
        'cmd': 'N/A',
        'cves': ['CVE-2022-42821'],
        'risk': 'CRITICAL',
        'mitigated': 'Patched in macOS 13.1',
    },
    'acl_writeextattr': {
        'name': 'ACL WriteExtattr Restriction',
        'desc': 'Set ACL to prevent quarantine attribute from being set',
        'cmd': 'chmod +a "everyone deny writeextattr" <file>',
        'cves': ['CVE-2022-42821'],
        'risk': 'HIGH',
        'mitigated': 'Patched in macOS 13.1',
    },
    'applescript_archive': {
        'name': 'AppleScript Disk Image',
        'desc': 'Applet inside DMG may bypass notarization check',
        'cmd': 'N/A',
        'cves': ['CVE-2021-30657'],
        'risk': 'CRITICAL',
        'mitigated': 'Patched in macOS 11.3',
    },
    'safari_download_race': {
        'name': 'Safari Download Race Condition',
        'desc': 'Race condition between download and quarantine attribute set',
        'cmd': 'N/A',
        'cves': ['CVE-2023-32364'],
        'risk': 'HIGH',
        'mitigated': 'Patched in macOS 13.5',
    },
    'translocation_bypass': {
        'name': 'App Translocation Bypass',
        'desc': 'Move app to non-quarantined location before first launch',
        'cmd': 'N/A',
        'cves': [],
        'risk': 'MEDIUM',
        'mitigated': 'Randomized translocation paths',
    },
    'ad_hoc_signing': {
        'name': 'Ad-Hoc Signature Bypass',
        'desc': 'Self-sign binary with ad-hoc identity to pass basic checks',
        'cmd': 'codesign --force --sign - <binary>',
        'cves': [],
        'risk': 'MEDIUM',
        'mitigated': 'Notarization still required for distribution',
    },
    'bundle_structure_abuse': {
        'name': 'Bundle Structure Manipulation',
        'desc': 'Craft app bundle with symlinks or special structure to confuse checks',
        'cmd': 'N/A',
        'cves': ['CVE-2022-22616'],
        'risk': 'HIGH',
        'mitigated': 'Patched in macOS 12.3',
    },
}

# Code signature authority chain levels
AUTHORITY_LEVELS = {
    'Apple Root CA': 'APPLE_ROOT',
    'Apple Code Signing': 'APPLE_SIGNED',
    'Developer ID': 'DEVELOPER_ID',
    'Apple Development': 'DEVELOPMENT',
    'Apple Distribution': 'DISTRIBUTION',
}


class GatekeeperAnalyzer:
    """Analyze Gatekeeper and Notarization security"""

    def __init__(self):
        self.findings = []

    def full_analysis(self, app_paths=None):
        """Run complete Gatekeeper analysis"""
        result = {
            'gatekeeper_status': self._check_gatekeeper_status(),
            'app_assessments': [],
            'quarantine_analysis': [],
            'notarization_status': [],
            'bypass_techniques': {},
            'stats': {},
        }

        # Default app paths
        if app_paths is None:
            app_paths = []
            apps_dir = '/Applications'
            if os.path.isdir(apps_dir):
                for app_name in sorted(os.listdir(apps_dir)):
                    if app_name.endswith('.app'):
                        app_paths.append(os.path.join(apps_dir, app_name))
                        if len(app_paths) >= 20:
                            break

        # Assess each app
        for app_path in app_paths:
            if os.path.exists(app_path):
                assessment = self._assess_app(app_path)
                result['app_assessments'].append(assessment)

        # Check bypass technique applicability
        for tech_id, tech_info in GK_BYPASS_TECHNIQUES.items():
            result['bypass_techniques'][tech_id] = {
                'name': tech_info['name'],
                'risk': tech_info['risk'],
                'cves': tech_info['cves'],
                'mitigated': tech_info['mitigated'],
            }

        # Statistics
        total_apps = len(result['app_assessments'])
        notarized = sum(1 for aa in result['app_assessments'] if aa.get('notarized'))
        dev_signed = sum(1 for aa in result['app_assessments'] if aa.get('authority_type') == 'DEVELOPER_ID')
        apple_signed = sum(1 for aa in result['app_assessments'] if aa.get('authority_type') in ('APPLE_ROOT', 'APPLE_SIGNED'))
        unsigned = sum(1 for aa in result['app_assessments'] if not aa.get('codesigned'))
        quarantined = sum(1 for aa in result['app_assessments'] if aa.get('quarantined'))
        hardened = sum(1 for aa in result['app_assessments'] if aa.get('hardened'))

        result['stats'] = {
            'total_apps': total_apps,
            'notarized': notarized,
            'developer_signed': dev_signed,
            'apple_signed': apple_signed,
            'unsigned': unsigned,
            'quarantined': quarantined,
            'hardened': hardened,
            'gatekeeper_enabled': result['gatekeeper_status'].get('enabled', False),
        }

        result['findings'] = self.findings[:]
        return result

    def _check_gatekeeper_status(self):
        """Check Gatekeeper global status"""
        status = {'enabled': True, 'raw': ''}
        try:
            proc = subprocess.run(['spctl', '--status'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5)
            status['raw'] = proc.stdout.strip()
            status['enabled'] = 'enabled' in proc.stdout.lower()
            if not status['enabled']:
                self.findings.append(('CRITICAL', 'Gatekeeper is DISABLED'))
        except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
            status['raw'] = 'Unknown'
        return status

    def _assess_app(self, app_path):
        """Assess a single application"""
        app_name = os.path.basename(app_path)
        assessment = {
            'path': app_path,
            'name': app_name,
            'codesigned': False,
            'hardened': False,
            'notarized': False,
            'quarantined': False,
            'authority_chain': [],
            'authority_type': 'UNSIGNED',
            'team_id': '',
            'identifier': '',
            'flags': '',
            'gatekeeper_pass': None,
            'issues': [],
        }

        # Check quarantine attribute
        try:
            proc = subprocess.run(
                ['xattr', '-p', 'com.apple.quarantine', app_path],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5
            )
            if proc.returncode == 0 and proc.stdout.strip():
                assessment['quarantined'] = True
                assessment['quarantine_value'] = proc.stdout.strip()
        except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
            pass

        # Check code signature
        try:
            proc = subprocess.run(
                ['codesign', '-dvvv', app_path],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10
            )
            cs_out = proc.stderr
            assessment['codesigned'] = proc.returncode == 0

            if assessment['codesigned']:
                # Parse signature details
                for line in cs_out.split('\n'):
                    if line.startswith('Authority='):
                        auth = line.split('Authority=')[1].strip()
                        assessment['authority_chain'].append(auth)
                    elif line.startswith('TeamIdentifier='):
                        assessment['team_id'] = line.split('=')[1].strip()
                    elif line.startswith('Identifier='):
                        assessment['identifier'] = line.split('=')[1].strip()
                    elif 'flags=' in line:
                        assessment['flags'] = line.split('flags=')[1].strip()

                # Determine authority type
                for auth in assessment['authority_chain']:
                    for auth_key, auth_type in AUTHORITY_LEVELS.items():
                        if auth_key in auth:
                            assessment['authority_type'] = auth_type
                            break

                # Check hardened runtime
                assessment['hardened'] = 'runtime' in cs_out.lower()

                # Check if ad-hoc signed (no real identity)
                if assessment['team_id'] == 'not set' or not assessment['authority_chain']:
                    assessment['issues'].append('Ad-hoc signed (no developer identity)')
                    self.findings.append(('MEDIUM', 'Ad-hoc signed app: %s' % app_name))

            else:
                assessment['issues'].append('Not code signed')
                self.findings.append(('HIGH', 'Unsigned app: %s' % app_name))

        except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
            pass

        # Check notarization (stapled ticket)
        try:
            proc = subprocess.run(
                ['stapler', 'validate', app_path],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10
            )
            assessment['notarized'] = proc.returncode == 0
            if not assessment['notarized'] and assessment['codesigned']:
                if assessment['authority_type'] == 'DEVELOPER_ID':
                    assessment['issues'].append('Developer signed but not notarized')
                    self.findings.append(('MEDIUM', 'Not notarized: %s' % app_name))
        except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
            pass

        # Gatekeeper assessment
        try:
            proc = subprocess.run(
                ['spctl', '--assess', '--type', 'execute', app_path],
                capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10
            )
            assessment['gatekeeper_pass'] = proc.returncode == 0
            if proc.returncode != 0:
                assessment['gk_reason'] = proc.stderr.strip()
        except (FileNotFoundError, subprocess.TimeoutExpired):
            pass

        return assessment


def demo():
    """Run Gatekeeper analysis on real system"""
    print("macOS Gatekeeper + Notarization Bypass Analyzer v1.0")
    print("=" * 60)

    analyzer = GatekeeperAnalyzer()
    result = analyzer.full_analysis()

    # Gatekeeper status
    gk = result['gatekeeper_status']
    print("\n  Gatekeeper: %s" % ('ENABLED' if gk['enabled'] else 'DISABLED'))
    print("  Status: %s" % gk['raw'])

    # Statistics
    stats = result['stats']
    print("\n  Application Assessment Summary:")
    print("    Total apps scanned: %d" % stats['total_apps'])
    print("    Apple signed: %d" % stats['apple_signed'])
    print("    Developer ID signed: %d" % stats['developer_signed'])
    print("    Notarized: %d" % stats['notarized'])
    print("    Hardened runtime: %d" % stats['hardened'])
    print("    Quarantined: %d" % stats['quarantined'])
    print("    Unsigned: %d" % stats['unsigned'])

    # App details
    print("\n  Application Details:")
    for aa in result['app_assessments']:
        name = aa['name'].replace('.app', '')
        if len(name) > 30:
            name = name[:27] + '...'
        auth_type = aa['authority_type']
        hardened = 'Hard' if aa['hardened'] else '----'
        notarized = 'Notarized' if aa['notarized'] else '---------'
        gk_pass = 'GK-PASS' if aa['gatekeeper_pass'] else 'GK-FAIL' if aa['gatekeeper_pass'] is False else 'GK-????'
        quarantine = 'Q' if aa['quarantined'] else '-'
        team = aa.get('team_id', '')[:10]

        print("    %-30s %-12s %s %s %s %s %s" % (name, auth_type, hardened, notarized, gk_pass, quarantine, team))

        if aa['issues']:
            for issue in aa['issues'][:2]:
                print("      [!] %s" % issue)

    # Bypass techniques
    print("\n  Known Bypass Techniques (%d):" % len(result['bypass_techniques']))
    for tech_id, tech_data in result['bypass_techniques'].items():
        tech_full = GK_BYPASS_TECHNIQUES[tech_id]
        cves = ', '.join(tech_data['cves']) or 'No CVE'
        print("    [%s] %s" % (tech_data['risk'], tech_full['name']))
        print("         %s" % tech_full['desc'][:80])
        if cves != 'No CVE':
            print("         CVEs: %s | Mitigated: %s" % (cves, tech_data['mitigated']))

    # Findings
    if result['findings']:
        print("\n  Security Findings (%d):" % len(result['findings']))
        for sev, msg in result['findings'][:15]:
            print("    [%s] %s" % (sev, msg))

    print("\nGatekeeper analyzer ready")


demo()

    'authentication': {

                   'NOTIFY_LOGIN_LOGIN', 'NOTIFY_LOGIN_LOGOUT', 'NOTIFY_SU', 'NOTIFY_SUDO',
                   'NOTIFY_LW_SESSION_LOGIN', 'NOTIFY_LW_SESSION_LOGOUT',
                   'NOTIFY_LW_SESSION_LOCK', 'NOTIFY_LW_SESSION_UNLOCK',
                   'NOTIFY_SCREENSHARING_ATTACH', 'NOTIFY_SCREENSHARING_DETACH',
                   'NOTIFY_AUTHORIZATION_PETITION', 'NOTIFY_AUTHORIZATION_JUDGEMENT'],

    'persistence': {
